title: Old Ores
description: Old ore textures gives the game a older look to the game perfect for an old Minecraft player wanting to feel nostalgia of the early days on minecraft!
body:
# Old Ores
 Prefer the old ores textures? This resource-pack when enabled changes back to the old ores. 
##  
![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2pTiVO1P/images/511ab970c74b1704b26bab95c72c710157604436.png)
